experiments.title: On-Device Audio Fingerprinter
experiments.description: Extract BPM, key, loudness, and spectral features from audio files entirely on-device using TarsosDSP. Part of the MediaApp recommendation pipeline.

experiments.title: Telegram → GitHub JSON CMS
experiments.description: A Node.js Telegram bot that lets me add projects, posts, and apps to this website by sending messages from my phone. Updates JSON files via GitHub API and triggers a Pages rebuild.

experiments.title: RAG Study Assistant
experiments.description: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation tool that lets me ask questions about my own UPSC notes. Planned to run locally on-device without any API calls.

experiments.title: YouTube Analytics Tracker
experiments.description: A Python script that pulls channel analytics via the YouTube Data API and saves trends locally. Useful for understanding which content format works best.

experiments.title: Geography Map Quiz App
experiments.description: An interactive map-based quiz app in KivyMD that tests geography knowledge — country capitals, rivers, mountain ranges. Aimed at UPSC preparation.

experiments.title: Daily Current Affairs Summariser
experiments.description: A Python automation that fetches top Indian current affairs headlines daily, summarises them using an LLM, and sends a Telegram digest every morning.
